Procurement and Supply Chain Solutions for Oil & Gas Industry

Expert Procurement Services For Maximum Efficiency Around The Globe

Learn More

Delivering Excellence, Every Step of The Way

Are you struggling to find reliable and efficient supply chain solutions for the oil and gas sectors? Unreliable suppliers often lead to costly delays, project setbacks and insurmountable obstacles.

Cedar International Inc. provides comprehensive procurement services for oil and gas companies across North America, Europe, North Africa and the Middle East, designed specifically to streamline your operations, reduce lead times and minimize legal and operational risks.

Your Trusted Partner For Supply Chain Solutions

Built on the core values of commitment to the client, transparency and exceptional service, Cedar International Inc. has built a reputation as a reliable source of superior-quality products from the world’s leading manufacturers, suppliers and distributors. Our global distribution network, combined with our team’s extreme attention to detail, ensures that your unique needs are met swiftly and effectively.

Expertise & Efficiency

With over a decade of proven experience in the oil and gas sectors, we understand the industry’s evolving challenges and can help you overcome them.

Global Reach

With offices and warehouse facilities in strategic hubs, such as Houston(USA), Toronto(CANADA), UAE and UK we can ensure fast delivery of products regardless of your location.

Expert Team

Our team of technically qualified professionals works closely with you to provide tailor-made solutions and stellar support – from initial consultation to final delivery.  

Who We Are

At Cedar International Inc., we pride ourselves on forging enduring client relationships. Through consistent performance and an unwavering dedication to success, we work tirelessly to help you succeed. For more than a decade, Cedar International Inc. has been a dependable ally for oil and gas companies looking to enhance their operations and solve some of the most common problems in the industry. With strategic collaborations with reputable business partners in Africa, Europe, Middle East, North America and South America, we have enhanced our capacity to provide robust supply chain solutions that can make a huge difference in this hyper-competitive market.

Why Work With Us?

  • Competitive pricing and quality products

  • Seamless logistics and transportation to reduce lead times

  • Cutting-edge technology and data insights to help you make informed strategic decisions.
  • High-quality products sourced from industry-leading suppliers from around the world
  • A whole team of dedicated professionals, working 24/7 for your success, at your disposal.

What We Offer:

  • Construction Materials
  • Drilling Equipment
  • Electrical Division
  • Lumber
  • Plumbing materials
  • HVAC Units & Spare Parts
  • Generators & Motors
  • Turbines & Spare Parts
  • Compressors
  • API Steel Pipes (SS, CS, Alloy, ERW, LSAW, SSAW Tubes)
  • Studs & Bolts
  • Toolkit
  • Oil Field Electricals 
  • Instrumentation & Process Equipments
  • Valves & Flanges
  • Drilling Equipment
  • Safety Items
  • Softwares (Operations, Upstream, Midstream and Downstream)

Our Process:

Initial Consultation: Understanding your unique requirements and your location’s challenges is the cornerstone of our success. Our experts conduct a thorough assessment of your current needs, and identify areas for improvement. 

Tailor-Made Strategy: Based on the initial consultation, we develop a 100% customized procurement strategy that includes finding the best suppliers, negotiating cost-saving prices, and mapping an efficient logistics plan. 

Continuous Support: We manage the entire order process, secure the best deals, and ensure prompt delivery to your site. You can focus on your core operations, and leave the rest to us.
